## What is eDesk?

eDesk is a customer support platform designed for online sellers juggling multiple storefronts and marketplaces. It pulls messages from Amazon, eBay, Walmart, Shopify, WooCommerce, WhatsApp, Instagram, and 300+ other sources into a single inbox, then uses AI to route, respond to, and resolve support tickets automatically.

## Who is it for?

eCommerce businesses — from growing DTC brands on Shopify to large multi-marketplace sellers — that are drowning in support volume across disparate channels. It's particularly well-suited for teams that need pre-sales chat to drive conversions as well as post-purchase support.

## Strengths

- **eCommerce-native integrations** — native connectors for every major marketplace and storefront, not generic webhooks.
- **AI agent automation** — resolves up to 65% of tickets without human touch; case studies show 61% faster response times.
- **Review management** — automates feedback collection and reputation monitoring across platforms.
- **Pre-sales support** — answers product questions in real time to convert browsers into buyers.
- **Reporting and analytics** — real-time dashboards to track agent performance and support trends.

## What to consider

- AI automation quality depends heavily on how well you build and maintain your knowledge base.
- Pricing adds up quickly for high-volume teams; per-resolution AI charges stack on top of seat fees.
- Less suited to non-eCommerce B2B or SaaS support teams who don't need the marketplace integrations.

## Bottom line

eDesk is one of the most purpose-built help desks for eCommerce operators. If you're managing support across multiple storefronts and marketplaces, the unified inbox and eCommerce-specific automations save real time. Generic help desks can technically do the same, but they require significantly more integration work to get there.
